transcript.text:
Raw marinated crabs... About 10 each?
Oh my...
[Taean's Hidden Restaurant]
[Soy sauce base]
[Chili paste base]
Just speechless How will she eat all of that?
She can't
[Is she really doing it?]
There's no way this just happened
Hello everyone
I'm here at Taean county
I really wanted to eat some raw marinated crabs, so I was looking for places
I heard that there's a hidden crab restaurant that the only locals know about
I really want some
[Sea Crab House located in Taean]
[The owner recognizes Tzuyang right away]

Hello
Tzu.yang.
Do you know me?
I watch you every day Really?
How did you know right away?
You look exactly like how you are on screen
Tzuyang came a long way
It's been about a year and a half since I came to a restaurant for raw crabs
Very long ago
Raw marinated crab It's going to be tasty
8 soy sauce-based crabs,
8 of them?
[Astonished]
You already know I eat a lot Yes I do
You always eat piles of food
8 of the spicy ones as well

8 and 8?
Okay, I got you
Thank you
Oh my...
[The kitchen is getting busy]
[Soy Sauce Marinated Crabs]
[How is that possible?]
[Spicy Marinated Crabs]
Just speechless How will she eat all of that?
She can't
I added 4 more crabs because 16 isn't going to be enough
That's a lot of side dishes
Does the soup come with the order? Yes
Let me know if it's not enough Thank you
It comes with the soup Amazing
Thank you

Enjoy your meal You got this Tzuyang!
Thank you
I'll come back to watch you eat later
Thank you
Bon appetit
Where to start?
Let's do the soy sauce
Looks good
Filled with roe
Gotta squeeze this out
Looks so good
[Touched]
How is it so nutty?
It's not salty
Really savory
How?

How do I say this
It really has no saltiness
It's just so nutty
Did they put sesame oil in here?
These are the times I think to myself that I'm in the right profession
Soup
Now that's a broth
It neutralizes the crabs' base seasonings
Spicy ones this time
These are filled with roe as well Amazing
Completely filled
[Please give me a bite]
This is nutty too
I guess these crabs are just very nutty
It's a little spicy
Like a tingling taste?

How do I explain this? It's so hard
Why are delicious foods so hard to explain?
I'll just eat
There's so much
You can't let any meat go to waste
The soup really neutralizes the spiciness
[Heavenly]
I'm going to need a bowl of rice
It's going to be so good with rice
It's burning hot
Beans?
[This was not part of the plan]
Scoop
[Aim]
[Fire]
[Concentrating]

Some of the spicy ones too
It just keeps coming out
[This flavor?!]
It's a must to eat these crabs with rice It's just too good
Thank you
Dried green laver (dried seaweed)
On top
Isn't this amazing?
That's a lot coming from 1 crab I can do 1 bowl of rice per crab
Let's double-wrap
[It was too much]
[These crabs will bring you tears] I'm tearing up
[Equipped]
The legs are easy to eat
Soy sauce crabs
How is it so orange?

Oh no
We need to balance it out
Very hard to decide
Soy sauce ones are good by itself The spicy ones are good with rice
[Here's a bowl]
Thank you
Do you by any chance have raw eggs?
[Yes we do]
Thank you
Do you need anything else? No, that's all
Put the rice in here
Crab party~!
Everything can be scraped out
[2nd piece]
[3rd piece]
[4th piece]

This mixed rice has 2 crabs inside
It's very precious 2-crabs-bibimbap
So much roe
They're in the sides as well
You can't forget about the sides
It comes out like this
No sesame oil is even needed
I wonder who came up with this dish
[That person needs a biography]
[Inaudible]
[Basically saying they're both good]
[Oh my...]
[They're watching her stream]
Where's the food going to?
Is she that good at digesting?
A figure that is unprecedented

Excuse me, 1 more bowl of rice please
Did you finish it all?
I'm not finished yet
I can hear my own voice from the other room
We're watching you right now
Thank you
Beans...
[Caught red handed]
Oh, you don't eat beans
[Now the truth comes out]
Soy sauce crabs
3 crabs bibimbap
Over here
[Can't let it go to waste]
It's filled with roe
Crack an egg in here

This is just amazing
Shocking
So flavorful
Sesame oil
The smell
[Stunned]
You're missing out if you don't put sesame oil in your mixed rice with crabs
Really missing out
It's so good 2 times better
On top
Kimchi
Is this why they give you kimchi?
Excuse me, can I have 2 more bowls of rice?
She's eating 4 bowls of rice
Will she be okay?
Can you eat everything?

Yes I can
My gosh Thank you
[Can't help but get excited]
So good
[Finished the spicy crabs]
[Now for the soy sauce crabs]
[Put them all in]
Last one
Over here
[Double yolk]
I've never seen it before
2 yolks What?
What happened?
It has 2 yolks
I guess good things are coming your way
Maybe the restaurant will do very well

No, it's good fortune towards you
Thank you
2 yolks!
[Don't forget to breathe, Tzuyang...]
Is this video going to go viral?
10 million views...?!
[Mixing up happiness]
[Tastes 2 times better]
[Conquered]
Did you starve a couple of meals? No, I had dinner last night
Is this your last meal of the day?
No, I'm eating dinner later
There's no way this just happened
[I must be dreaming]
The crabs were not salty and they were flavorful
That was a very good meal
